items.title: I caved and downloaded Hermes to try.
items.title_zh: 我屈服并下载了 Hermes 来尝试。
items.description: I caved and downloaded Hermes to try. For those of you who have tried both Hermes and OpenClaw what difference do you notice? No shilling please, just want some honest opinions

items.title: How to keep your agents running even when your macbook lid is closed: 1.
items.title_zh: 即使您的 MacBook 盖子关闭，如何保持代理运行： 1.
items.description: How to keep your agents running even when your macbook lid is closed: 1. Go to Mac App Store and download Amphetamine 2. Go to Settings → Session Defaults → uncheck everything below You're welcome :) https://t.co/mRVEq7c7Ly https://t.co/YU…
items.description_zh: 即使您的 MacBook 盖子关闭，如何保持代理运行： 1. 转到 Mac App Store 并下载安非他明 2. 转到设置 → 会话默认值 → 取消选中下面的所有内容 不客气 :) https://t.co/mRVEq7c7Ly https://t.co/YU…

items.title: Whether it’s existing consulting firms, new ones that emerge, FDEs from agent vendors, or…
items.title_zh: 无论是现有的咨询公司、新出现的咨询公司、代理供应商的 FDE，还是……
items.description: Whether it’s existing consulting firms, new ones that emerge, FDEs from agent vendors, or new internal agent engineering roles, the amount of work that is going to be created to implement agents in enterprises will exceed anything we imagi…
items.description_zh: 无论是现有的咨询公司、新出现的咨询公司、代理供应商的 FDE，还是新的内部代理工程角色，在企业中实施代理所需的工作量将超出我们的想象……

meta.bio: ceo @box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI

items.title: In general, we should treat AI like a utility, not like a being.
items.title_zh: 一般来说，我们应该将人工智能视为一种实用工具，而不是一种存在。
items.description: In general, we should treat AI like a utility, not like a being. The more we confuse what AI is the more we will make ourselves go crazy with analogies that will never fully hold true. https://t.co/Ysezok4kUp
items.description_zh: 一般来说，我们应该将人工智能视为一种实用工具，而不是一种存在。我们越是混淆人工智能是什么，我们就越会因为那些永远不会完全成立的类比而变得疯狂。 https://t.co/Ysezok4kUp

meta.bio: ceo @box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI

items.title: This is why GBrain is open source.
items.title_zh: 这就是 GBrain 开源的原因。
items.description: This is why GBrain is open source. Why I run my own stack. The explosion in intelligence means building your own context is more important than ever. If you own and run your own prompts and your own data, then you earn the ability to think…
items.description_zh: 这就是 GBrain 开源的原因。为什么我运行自己的堆栈。智力的爆炸性增长意味着构建自己的环境比以往任何时候都更加重要。如果您拥有并运行自己的提示和数据，那么您就获得了思考的能力……

items.title: The goal of Personal AI: civilization where individual humans, augmented by AI, can do co…
items.title_zh: 个人人工智能的目标：在人工智能的增强下，个体人类可以合作的文明……
items.description: The goal of Personal AI: civilization where individual humans, augmented by AI, can do consequential work without being captured by extractive institutions. Freedom to write your prompt and own your data. This is the new battleground. 2034…
items.description_zh: 个人人工智能的目标：在人工智能的增强下，人类个体可以在不被榨取性机构捕获的情况下完成重要的工作。自由编写提示并拥有您的数据。这是新的战场。 2034…

items.title: GBrain supports multiple repos, multiple MCP endpoints, and both full oAuth and Bearer To…
items.title_zh: GBrain 支持多个存储库、多个 MCP 端点以及完整的 oAuth 和 Bearer To…
items.description: GBrain supports multiple repos, multiple MCP endpoints, and both full oAuth and Bearer Tokens, and all you have to do to get the admin panel is go to OpenClaw or Hermes and ask for the one-time admin login link. https://t.co/yFpFU4pn5b
items.description_zh: GBrain 支持多个存储库、多个 MCP 端点以及完整的 oAuth 和不记名令牌，要获取管理面板，您只需转到 OpenClaw 或 Hermes 并请求一次性管理登录链接。 https://t.co/yFpFU4pn5b
